_README: Seed ledger for contradiction-gate.mjs Detector 3 (asserted-figure vs unsupported-disclaimer).
This is the ED9 / EEA-TOUCH-01 pattern: one record asserts a numeric figure that another
record's scope/caveat/confidence_note calls unsupported or absent. It cannot be reduced to a
structural invariant (it is prose-vs-number), so it runs off this hand-curated ledger.
Each row names WHERE the figure is asserted and WHERE it is disclaimed; the gate warns only
when BOTH the asserted figure and the disclaimer string are still present live (i.e. neither
side was fixed). Seed a row the moment a reviewer finds a live asserted-vs-disclaimed pair.
Ships EMPTY on purpose: Detector 3 is stubbed until this ledger is curated (see report).

_schema.id: short stable slug for the contradiction
_schema.figure: the numeric/phrase claim in dispute, e.g. 'sixteen primate genera'

asserted_in.needle: substring proving the assertion is live

disclaimed_in.needle: substring proving the disclaimer is live

_schema.note: why this is a contradiction; the audit ref
